title: Incorrect behavior with subqueries in DELETE
poc: delete from x where a in (select nonexistant from y);
delete from x where a in (select a from y);
delete from x where a in (select a from y where a < 10);
key_bug_features: DELETE with subqueries on non-existent columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a_table (id integer PRIMARY KEY, name varchar(50));
CREATE TABLE b_table (id integer, value float CHECK (value > 0));
DELETE FROM a_table WHERE id IN (SELECT non_existent FROM b_table);
